rag_rules: AGREE contracts for component ports must be placed in component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Implementation-level bindings should be placed in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
generic_rules: Output dependency guarantees should relate visible outputs to visible inputs
Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE scalar types are int, real, and bool; use valid type names in const and eq declarations
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type annexes unless represented through valid variables or outputs
